description: Representative LDCS (Local Delivery Compliance Standard) parse output for E2E content assertion tests. Defines the expected structural output of the MAT criteria parsing pipeline when given a standard LDCS document.

sample_mps.name: Organisational Governance
sample_mps.intent_statement: The organisation has effective governance structures that provide clear leadership and accountability for service delivery.

sample_criterion.title: Governance framework
sample_criterion.description: The organisation has a documented governance framework that is reviewed annually.
